strengths: Strong advanced Excel and Power BI skills
Hands-on SQL and Python ETL experience
weaknesses: Limited direct underwriting or finance domain experience
Title not Operations Analyst / Profit Center specific
improvement_bullets: Standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks, utilizing process mapping and Visio-style workflow documentation to ensure cross-functional alignment and eliminate reporting discrepancies.
Investigated root causes of data mismatches in operations, conducting thorough process mapping to redesign workflows and replace manual reporting with automated, system-integrated solutions.

Collaborated with cross-functional teams, including finance and operations, to analyze current policy administration workflows and implement systemic improvements that increased overall efficiency by 40%.
Partnered with IT teams to translate complex business requirements into technical specifications for system enhancements, ensuring seamless support for profit center objectives.
Leveraged strong analytical background to bridge the gap between technical IT systems and business operations, ensuring data integrity across complex commercial datasets.
cover_letter: Hiring Manager, Starr, New York, NY. Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Operations Analyst opportunity with Starr. I am interested in this opportunity because of Starr’s reputation as a global leader in commercial insurance and its commitment to empowering employees to innovate through a collaborative, entrepreneurial culture. What interests me about working for Starr is its long-standing legacy of excellence and its investment in developing internal talent, which inspires me to apply my analytical background to help drive real progress within your profit center. I believe my advanced data modeling and automation skills and my proven track record in cross-functional stakeholder collaboration would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by focusing on long-term process optimization and data-driven efficiency. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified a major inefficiency in manual reporting and developed automated Power BI and Looker workflows to replace fragmented processes. This initiative eliminated repetitive data entry, saved 8 hours per week, and provided a consistent 'single source of truth' for stakeholders, directly supporting faster, more informed strategic decision-making. Ultimately, I know that the Operations Analyst role at Starr would allow me to bring my technical proficiency in SQL and Python to streamline complex operational workflows. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my process mapping and system-design skills. I regularly conducted deep-dive investigations into operational bottlenecks, mapping out end-to-end data flows to implement solutions that reduced reporting discrepancies by 40%. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my problem-solving skills in working on system enhancements and process improvements at Starr. I know that my technical expertise and business-centric communication align with what it takes to succeed in the Operations Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
